comment: Reproduces Wei's KG4OJT deadlock from RT260411.TXT at 14:59:13. We beacon CQ, DX replies with TX1 (grid), we enter REPORT state. DX never copies our TX2, retries exhaust, context moves to inactive (next_tx clobbered to TX_UNDEF). Beacon CQs continue for many periods. Eventually DX retries their TX1 (grid) — finds inactive context, reactivates it. State machine: REPORT + TX1 falls to default, returns false WITHOUT refreshing next_tx. Context is now in active zone with state=REPORT, next_tx=TX_UNDEF, sorted to front (REPORT > CALLING), blocking the beacon CQ from ever transmitting. BEFORE FIX: TX stops entirely after reactivation. AFTER FIX: TX2 resumes to KG4OJT.

periods.comment: Period 1 (odd): DX replies with TX1 (grid). CALLING+TX1 -> REPORT, TX2
Period 6 (even): TX2 final retry, tick exhausts retries, move_to_inactive (REPORT > REPLYING = has_exchanged). next_tx clobbered to TX_UNDEF

Period 11 (odd): ★ DX finally retries TX1 (grid). on_decode finds ctx in inactive, reactivates. generate_response: REPORT + TX1 -> default -> return false WITHOUT refreshing next_tx. Context lands in active zone with state=REPORT, next_tx=TX_UNDEF, retry=0/2.
Period 12 (even): BEFORE FIX: no TX (KG4OJT blocks CQ at queue[0] with next_tx=TX_UNDEF). AFTER FIX: TX TX2 resumes to KG4OJT.
Period 14 (even): BEFORE FIX: still stuck. AFTER FIX: TX2 retry to KG4OJT.
